catalog.name: NCAR/CW3E CESM2 L32 and L83 SMYLE

dataset.name: NCAR/CW3E CESM2 L32 and L83 SMYLE

documentation.xlink:title: NCAR GDEX - NCAR/CW3E CESM2 L32 and L83 SMYLE(d651083)

metadata.documentation: This dataset contains outputs for initialized seasonal hindcasts with CESM2 performed with different vertical resolutions: a 32 level model with an approximately 40km model lid (standard CAM6 resolution) and an 83 level model with an approximately 80km model lid. The hindcasts consist of 20 member ensembles initialized from November 1st, February 1st and September 1st for each year from 1970 to 2020 and run for 6 months in the case of L83 and 12 months in the case of L32. These experiments are described in more detail in Simpson et al. (2026) "The impact of enhanced vertical resolution on seasonal prediction skill of the Quasi-Biennial Oscillation and its teleconnections in CESM2: a new community hindcast dataset" in JGR Atmospheres.
